name: I'm on a large chandelier
hints: You are on the chandelier high above the ballroom. A star and broken glass are here.
GET STAR and GET GLASS. The broken glass may be useful as a cutting tool elsewhere.
Take the star and glass. Be careful getting down - jumping without the right spell is fatal.
notes: On the chandelier above the ballroom. Contains a *STAR* and broken glass (useful as a cutting tool). Getting down requires care - the ballroom is far below. The broken glass can cut ropes and other items.
